健康植株.description: The strawberry plant (garden strawberry) is in excellent condition. Leaves are bright green, without spots, plaque, or deformations. The bush is vigorous, actively growing, flowering, and fruiting. Berries are large, evenly colored, without rot or mechanical damage.
symptoms: 无斑点、霉层、卷曲和坏死
果实大而健康，口感良好
健康植株.treatment: Continue standard care: regular root watering, timely removal of runners (if not needed for propagation), mulching beds, applying balanced fertilizers according to the growth stage.
健康植株.prevention: Observe crop rotation (return strawberries to the same place no earlier than after 3-4 years). Use healthy seedlings. Maintain optimal soil moisture (without stagnant water). Carry out preventive treatments with biological products in spring and autumn (Fitosporin, Trichodermin). Remove weeds and plant debris. Fertilize with potassium and phosphorus in time to boost immunity.

细菌性叶斑病.description: Bacterial disease. Yellow or brown irregular spots appear on leaves, growing quickly, as if after contact with fire.
细菌性叶斑病.treatment: Remove affected leaves. Spray with copper-containing preparations. If severely affected, destroy the plant.
细菌性叶斑病.prevention: Avoid injuring leaves, treat cuts with garden pitch, prevent waterlogging.

细菌性根癌.description: Bacterial disease. Ugly growths appear on the plant's roots, disrupting nutrition.
symptoms: 根部出现瘤状物和虫瘿
细菌性根癌.treatment: Dig up and burn diseased plants. Treat the soil with copper sulfate solution or Fitolavin.
细菌性根癌.prevention: Buy healthy seedlings, disinfect roots before planting, observe crop rotation.

细菌病.description: Bacterial disease caused by Corynebacterium fascians. Affects weakened plants. Bushes stop developing, leaves and stems become deformed, flowers grow on thick deformed pedicels.
细菌病.treatment: Remove and burn diseased plants. Treat remaining bushes with bactericides. Improve soil health.
细菌病.prevention: Maintain plant immunity, avoid overcrowding, apply phosphorus-potassium fertilizers.

腐烂病.description: Fungal disease caused by Sclerotinia libertiana. Berries rot and become covered with fluffy white mold.
symptoms: 果实上出现白色绒毛状霉层
腐烂病.treatment: Destroy affected berries and leaves. Spray plants with fungicides. Normalize humidity.
腐烂病.prevention: Avoid excessive watering, ventilate plantings, remove plant debris.

白斑病.description: Fungal disease caused by Mycosphaerella fragariae and Ramularia tulasnei. Brown spots appear on leaves, then light spots with a dark border.
白斑病.treatment: Remove diseased leaves. Spray with systemic fungicides. Repeat after 10-14 days if necessary.
白斑病.prevention: Use healthy seedlings, thin out plantings, avoid waterlogging.

褐斑病.description: Fungal disease caused by Marssonina petontillae. Leaves become covered with brown spots with a light center. Appears during fruit set and ripening.
褐斑病.treatment: Remove affected leaves. Treat bushes with fungicides. If severely infected, destroy plants.
褐斑病.prevention: Observe crop rotation, avoid overcrowding, remove weeds, mulch soil.

黄萎病.description: Fungal disease caused by Verticillium dahliae. Starts from the roots, then spreads to leaves, runners, and fruits. Develops especially quickly on sandy soils.
黄萎病.treatment: Water the soil and plants with fungicides. Remove severely affected bushes with a clump of soil.
黄萎病.prevention: Use healthy seedlings, observe crop rotation, add organic matter to improve soil.

丛枝病.description: Viral disease, also known as 'witches' broom'. Main signs: small flower stalks, lack of berries, and abundant shoot overgrowth.
丛枝病.treatment: No cure. Immediately remove and burn all affected bushes along with roots.
丛枝病.prevention: Purchase certified seedlings, disinfect soil, remove carriers (leafhoppers, aphids).

根腐病.description: Fungal disease caused by Armillaria mellea (honey fungus). The fungus settles on roots, preventing nutrition and growth. Lower leaves die off, harvest is poor.
根腐病.treatment: Dig up and burn diseased plants. Treat soil with liming and fungicides.
根腐病.prevention: Do not plant strawberries after trees or in old areas with honey fungus, use improved soil.

叶缘黄化.description: Viral disease. Central leaves turn yellow at the edges, bushes become dwarfed and pressed to the ground.
叶缘黄化.treatment: No cure. Remove diseased specimens. Treat soil against nematodes and viruses.
叶缘黄化.prevention: Use healthy planting material, control nematodes (potential carriers).

斑驳病.description: Viral disease. The presence of the virus is indicated by light green mottles (small spots) on leaves. The plant weakens, does not form runners or ovaries.
斑驳病.treatment: No cure. Destroy diseased bushes. Improve plantation health.
斑驳病.prevention: Buy verified seedlings, observe crop rotation, control aphids and leafhoppers.

花叶病.description: Viral disease. Yellow spots resembling a mosaic appear on leaf blades. Bush growth stops, runners and flower stalks dry up, leaves become deformed.
花叶病.treatment: No cure. Remove and burn affected plants. Disinfect the soil.
花叶病.prevention: Use resistant varieties, control sucking pests, do not take runners from diseased bushes.

卷叶病.description: Viral disease. Leaf blades curl, shrink, and roll towards the edges. Edges turn yellow and dry. Flowering usually does not occur.
卷叶病.treatment: No cure. Diseased plants must be immediately removed and burned.
卷叶病.prevention: Buy healthy seedlings, control carriers (aphids, mites), disinfect tools.

白粉病.description: Fungal disease caused by Uncinula necator. The entire bush becomes covered with white coating, leaves dry out, plant loses frost resistance.
symptoms: 叶片、茎和果实上出现白色粉状霉层
白粉病.treatment: Spray with sulfur-containing fungicides. Remove severely affected leaves.
白粉病.prevention: Do not overfeed with nitrogen, ensure air circulation, carry out preventive treatments.

非侵染性损伤.description: Damage caused by adverse environmental conditions, not pathogens. Includes freezing, hail damage, deficiency or excess of nutrients, water balance disturbance.
symptoms: 冰雹造成的撕裂和凹痕
缺素引起的黄化、叶缘焦枯
干旱或涝渍引起的萎蔫
非侵染性损伤.treatment: Restore agricultural practices: adjust watering, fertilize, cover for winter, protect from hail with netting. Remove severely damaged parts.
非侵染性损伤.prevention: Proper care, frost protection, balanced fertilizing, selection of zoned varieties.

叶焦病.description: Fungal disease caused by Diplocarpon earlianum. Brown spots enlarge, leaves become 'scorched'.
叶焦病.treatment: Remove diseased leaves. Treat with copper-containing preparations. Thin out plantings.
叶焦病.prevention: Avoid waterlogging, fertilize with potassium and phosphorus, carry out preventive spraying in spring.

花瓣绿化.description: Viral disease (phytoplasmosis). Leaves become small, yellowish-green with mosaic coloring. Flower petals shrink, acquire light green color, sepals overgrow. Berries do not set.
symptoms: 叶片细小呈黄绿色带花叶状
花瓣绿化.treatment: No cure. Remove all affected plants. Control carriers (leafhoppers).
花瓣绿化.prevention: Use healthy seedlings, destroy weeds, spray with insecticides against leafhoppers.

干枯病.description: Fungal disease caused by Ramularia grevilleana. Leaves become covered with rusty spots, dry out, plant languishes.
symptoms: 叶片上出现锈褐色斑点
干枯病.treatment: Remove diseased leaves. Spray with fungicides. In advanced cases, uproot plants.
干枯病.prevention: Maintain low humidity, ventilate plantings, apply phosphorus-potassium fertilizers.

丝核菌根腐病.description: Fungal disease caused by Rhizoctonia solani. Affects roots, causing bushes to not receive water and nutrition.
symptoms: 根部受害（褐色斑点、腐烂）
丝核菌根腐病.treatment: Water soil with fungicides. Transplant healthy bushes to a new area. Destroy diseased ones.
丝核菌根腐病.prevention: Disinfect soil before planting, do not add fresh manure, observe crop rotation.

灰霉病.description: Fungal disease caused by Botrytis cinerea. Berries develop patches with grayish fluffy mold coating, fruits rot. Develops with excessive moisture.
symptoms: 果实上出现灰色绒毛状霉层
灰霉病.treatment: Remove all rotten berries. Treat bushes with fungicides. Reduce watering. Mulch beds.
灰霉病.prevention: Avoid overcrowding, remove weeds, harvest berries on time, avoid water getting on fruits.

角斑病.description: Bacterial disease. Begins with watery damage on the underside of the leaf, then dark green angular spots form, exuding bacteria. Lesions merge into reddish spots with a chlorotic halo.
symptoms: 叶片背面出现水渍状小点
带黄色晕圈的红色斑点
角斑病.treatment: Remove diseased leaves. Treat with bactericides. Destroy heavily infected bushes.
角斑病.prevention: Use healthy runners, do not overhead water, carry out preventive spraying.

镰刀菌枯萎病.description: Fungal disease where the pathogen enters through roots, causing marginal leaf necrosis. Leaf blades change color at edges, then dry out. Develops in overcrowded plantings with high acidity.
symptoms: 叶缘坏死（叶缘黄化干枯）
镰刀菌枯萎病.treatment: Water soil with fungicide solution. Remove severely affected bushes. Deacidify soil.
镰刀菌枯萎病.prevention: Avoid overcrowding, control soil acidity (pH 5.5-6.5), use healthy planting material.

黑腐病.description: Fungal disease caused by fungi of the genus Mycosphaerella. Fruits become covered with black moldy coating and rot. Berries with mechanical damage are more often affected.
黑腐病.treatment: Collect and destroy diseased berries. Treat bushes with contact fungicides. Avoid injuring fruits.
黑腐病.prevention: Harvest carefully, avoid damage, maintain cleanliness in beds.

黑斑病（炭疽病）.description: Fungal disease caused by Colletotrichum acutatum. Manifests as dark specks on leaves, stems, and fruits. When roots are affected, bushes die.
symptoms: 叶柄、匍匐茎和果实上出现暗色凹陷斑点
黑斑病（炭疽病）.treatment: Remove and burn severely affected plants. Treat remaining bushes with copper-containing fungicides.
黑斑病（炭疽病）.prevention: Buy certified seedlings, disinfect soil, observe crop rotation.
